meaning: vt.消耗,消费,消灭,大吃大喝,吸引vi.消灭,毁灭
examples: Many people are unaware of just how much food and drink they consume.

So much so that "any minor change in what you usually consume is easily noted, " he says.
New start-up FLUD wants to provide a new way for people to consume news.
